title: Phase 32.4 — Batch 2 Gate
reason: Scale readiness conditions not met: 0 of 6 Phase 32 URLs indexed, impressions declining, discovered-not-indexed flat. Batch 2 deployment would be premature — it would add 5 more undiscovered URLs to a system that hasn't proven it can get the first 6 indexed.
next_evaluation: Jun 25 (Day 7 after Phase 32.2 deploy) — reassess after 7 days of Google having the fixed sitemap and canonical URLs
note: If scale ready on Jun 25, deploy maximum 5 pages from Batch 2 (NOT 25, 50, or 100). The 5-page cap is hard.
